hero.title: Launch Your New Career in 8-16 Weeks
hero.subtitle: Indiana's workforce programs pay for your training. No loans. No debt. Just real skills and a real job.

programs.title: Career Training Programs
programs.subtitle: Choose from healthcare, skilled trades, technology, and more. Most programs are fully funded through WIOA.

lesson.beforeYouStart: Before You Start — What Do You Already Know?
lesson.pretestNote: Not graded. These questions prime your brain for what's coming.
lesson.exploreInstruction: Click any component to learn what it does.
lesson.quizInstruction: Components are hidden. Identify each one.
lesson.reviewInstruction: Everything revealed — use this to study.
lesson.clickToUnlock: Click through all components to unlock Quiz mode.
lesson.completeQuizToUnlock: Complete the quiz to unlock Review mode.
lesson.labComplete: Lab complete — you've explored, been tested, and reviewed this system.
lesson.procedureInstruction: Use the arrows to put these steps in the correct order. Order matters on the job.
lesson.faultInstruction: Real gauge readings from a broken system. Read the numbers, identify the fault.
lesson.serviceInstruction: Work through these calls the way you would on the job. Try to diagnose before revealing the answer.
lesson.gaugeInstruction: Real system readings. Diagnose the problem before revealing the answer.
lesson.marcusDescription: Your HVAC instructor — ask anything about this lesson
lesson.typeMessage: Ask Marcus anything about this lesson...

studyGuide.title: EPA 608 Universal Certification Study Guide
studyGuide.subtitle: Complete Study Guide — All Four Sections
studyGuide.school: Elevate for Humanity Career & Training Institute · Indianapolis, IN
studyGuide.warning: You must pass all four sections (Core + Type I + II + III) to earn Universal certification.
studyGuide.clickToReveal: Click each question to reveal the answer. All answers are visible when printed.
studyGuide.footer: ETPL Program #10004322 · WIOA-Approved · EPA 608 exam administered by ESCO Group
studyGuide.footerNote: This guide covers content tested on the ESCO EPA 608 exam. Visit elearning.escogroup.org for official practice exams.
